description: Only the resources and interactions defined by pcm_process_flow.md are declared here.

implementation.description: PCM FHIR endpoint for consent and service orchestration.

text.div: CapabilityStatement for the PCM FHIR server. It supports Organization onboarding updates, Endpoint registration, HealthcareService catalog/instance management, and Consent lifecycle operations as documented in pcm_process_flow.md. HEAD is supported on resource read URLs for existence checks.

security.description: Client authentication uses mTLS and client_credentials tokens; PCM enforces authorization.

resource.documentation: PCM creates Organization skeletons; organizations update allowed contact and linkage fields. Activation is PCM-controlled.
FHIR server endpoint for a Data Source organization or the PCM system.

searchParam.name: identifier
searchParam.documentation: Search by HealthcareService business identifier (catalog or instance identifier system).

searchParam.name: service-category
searchParam.documentation: Search by HealthcareService.category using the FHIR R4 service-category search parameter.

searchParam.name: service-type
searchParam.documentation: Search by HealthcareService.type using the FHIR R4 service-type search parameter.

searchParam.name: organization
searchParam.documentation: Search by HealthcareService.providedBy using the FHIR R4 organization search parameter (instance profile only).

resource.documentation: Catalog definitions and instance registrations tied to organizations. Hosted/returned resources conform to the catalog and instance profiles. Create uses the documented submit payload shapes; submit profiles are illustrative only and are not sent in meta.profile. Public usability is exposed through HealthcareService.active only.

searchParam.name: identifier
searchParam.documentation: Search by PCM consent business identifier.

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search by patient logical reference. Identifier search uses the FHIR reference identifier modifier: patient:identifier=system|value.

searchParam.name: pcm-service
searchParam.documentation: Search by the pcmService extension reference (HealthcareService instance).

resource.documentation: Consent requests and lifecycle updates for PCM services. Hosted/returned resources conform to PCMConsent. Create uses the documented submit payload shape; the submit profile is illustrative only and is not sent in meta.profile. Supports _include=Consent:actor and _include:iterate=Organization:endpoint|Organization:partof on consent searches.

rest.documentation: PCM server supports only the interactions described in the process flow. HEAD is supported on resource read URLs for existence checks. Transaction Bundle interactions are not declared by this CapabilityStatement.

name: PcmCapabilityStatement
title: PCM FHIR Capability Statement
